nodes.name: Web Frontend
nodes.description: Browser-based user interface that serves the application to end users and communicates with the API service over HTTPS

nodes.name: API Service
nodes.description: Backend REST API that handles business logic, processes requests from the web frontend, and reads from and writes to the application database

nodes.name: Application Database
nodes.description: PostgreSQL relational database that persists all application data and is accessed exclusively by the API service

relationships.description: Sends user requests to and receives responses from the API service over HTTPS
Reads from and writes application data to the PostgreSQL database
